@here First things first - Before I enter any additional positions, I'm focusing on closing out (or at least initiating an exit plan) for our swings from yesterday <#1375558392889872495>

With our 100th member in the server, the time has come @everyone to start this __ <#1379472548751867954> __
- **Portfolio Starting Size**: $500
- **Account Type**: Cash Account (Robinhood <#1364205727153131652>) 
- **Premise**: We will set milestones as “checkpoints”, and progress through these milestones iteratively. 
- **Callouts** These will have the same format as indicated here <#1397299440062042143> . Most of these limit entries will be very inexpensive (<$100 premium) because of our small portfolio size. We will also be scaling in and out of positions very often — This makes following along more difficult, but the strategy is very powerful.

Expect our list of milestones to be published in this channel at market open today.

🚂 Welcome Aboard @everyone Please keep all hands and feet inside the vehicle at all times, and most importantly, *Enjoy the Ride*.t

@everyone Please let us start this challenge‼️

Only 6 more members until we hit our 100 member threshold! Invite a friend to help us cross this threshold <#1415177523293323406>

__Small Account Challenge Principles__
- CASH ACCOUNT, No margin accounts. This gives us maximum control of our money.
- Avoid investing >60% of ur total cash in the market - only trade ab 50-60% of ur portfolio value. --> Want to sit on >30% of ur port in the form of cash.
- Avoid staking >10% of your port in any single contract or options alert.
- Minimize entering contracts only @ one instance. **UTILIZE SCALING IN AND SCALING OUT**. This is so powerful. 

__3 ways to buy__ - dip buy, range-control buy, strength buy.
- There are special methods of dip-buying, we don't just buy if it goes down. Consolidation phases are acceptable scale-in periods, as long as your longer-term TA still supports your fundamental move.
- Range-buying: utilize double-bottoms & similar trends to plan out when & where (price level) to scale in.
- Strength buying: probably wont have the capital to do this in the <#1379472548751867954> , but I would argue this is the least powerful buying method anyway.
Let’s get more people in here so we can start the challenge guys!
You guys think we can get break 100 members this week? @here
We will be starting with $500 once we reach 100 members in the server
